articles.title: GTA 6 Delayed to November 2026
articles.summary: GTA 6 release is delayed. The new date is November 19, 2026. Gamers will wait longer.
articles.impact: Gamers wait longer for the highly anticipated GTA 6.

articles.title: Nvidia Control Panel Retired After 20 Years
articles.summary: Nvidia is retiring its Control Panel. A new app will replace it soon. This ends 20 years.
articles.impact: Nvidia users will use a new app for graphics settings.

articles.title: PlayStation Plus June Games Revealed
articles.summary: Sony announced June's PS Plus games. An Xbox game is a main title. New games are available soon.
articles.impact: PS Plus subscribers get new games to play next month.

articles.title: PlayStation Days of Play Sales Start Tomorrow
articles.summary: PlayStation sales start tomorrow. Find deals in stores and online. The sale ends June 10.
articles.impact: PlayStation fans get deals on games and PS Plus.

articles.title: Pokémon GO's Forever Forward Season Begins
articles.summary: A new Pokémon GO season starts June 2. It is called Forever Forward. Expect Mega Pokémon and GO Fest.
articles.impact: Pokémon GO players get new events and creatures.

articles.title: Classic Pokémon Game on Switch Today
articles.summary: Another classic Pokémon game is out. It is on Nintendo Switch. Indie developers made it.
articles.impact: Fans play a new game inspired by classic Pokémon on Switch.

articles.title: Destiny 2 Service Ending Soon
articles.summary: Destiny 2's service is ending. No new content will be added. Servers remain online.
articles.impact: Destiny 2 players get no new updates after June 9.

articles.title: People Prefer AI Music Over Real Music
articles.summary: Some people only listen to AI music. They use apps like Suno. They skip real songs.
articles.impact: AI music is popular; some users prefer it over human-made songs.
